title: Decoding Higher Education
text:
While university placement data is public, there is a lack of analytical perspective on how factors like faculty size and location impact a department’s popularity. This project identifies the underlying drivers of success for Industrial Engineering departments in Turkey.
Team Name: [Let It Happen]
Team Members: * Yusuf Bora Çavdar
* Onur Furkan Gök

title: Data Analytics & Results
text:
Comprehensive Data: 2018-2025 multi-year data extracted via thestats.
Analytical Approach: Moving from descriptive statistics to predictive insights.
Faculty Factor: Measuring the real impact of academic staff size on student rankings.

title: Data Analytics & Results
text:
1. Introduction to Analysis
This section presents our exploratory data analysis and findings. By leveraging the power of tidyverse and ggplot2, we uncover the trends that define Industrial Engineering education in Turkey.

title: Data Preparation
text: Our analysis is based on dynamic data retrieval from the YÖK Atlas system. By using the thestats package, we ensure our study is fully reproducible and updated with the latest 2025 statistics.
